mapper.select: SELECT * FROM local_message WHERE status = 0 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT * FROM local_message WHERE status = 2 AND retry_count < max_retry_count AND (next_retry_time IS NULL OR next_retry_time <= #{currentTime}) AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY next_retry_time ASC, create_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}
